block_02: Dinaank ke aapke anurodh ke sambandh me
block_06: Aapne account aur aapke sabhi vyaktigat data ko hataane ke aapke anurodh ke liye dhanyavaad. Aapki vyaktigat jaanakaari humare liye bahut mahatvapurn hai aur
block_08: data suraksha ko bahut gambhirata se leta hai. Apne graahakon ko behtarin sevaen dena humara lakshya hai.
block_10: Aapke anurodh ke baad humne aapke account ko band karne aur block karne ki prakriya shuru kar di hai aur humare anubandhaatmak sambandh ko aaj ki taarikh se tatkaal prabhaav se samaapt kar diya gaya hai.
block_12: Humare system ko aam taur par data nyunikaran aur aavashyakta ke siddhaanton ka paalan karne ke liye configure kiya gaya hai, taaki
block_14: aapke kissi bhi vyaktigat data ko sansaadhit na kare jo aapko humare sevaen pradaan karne ke liye ya kaanun ke samarthan me bilkul aavashyak nahin hai ya jis niyam se hum bandhe hain.
block_15: Aapke vyaktigat data ke liye aapke anurodh aur humare system ki samiksha karne ke baad, hum note karte hain ki vartamaan me rakhe gaye sabhi jaanakaari humare gopaniyata niti, Anti-Money Laundering aur aatankvaadi vittaposhan kaanunon aur viniyam aur any laagu kaanun aur viniyam jinse hum bandhe hain (viniyam) ke anusar humare sanvidaatmak sambandh ko samaapt karne ke baad saat saal tak banaye rakhi jaane hai. Viniyamon ke tahat aapke data ko kum se kum saat varshon tak banaye rakhna humara kaanuni daayitva hai.
block_16: Yadi aapke paas koi prashna hain ya yadi aapko lagta hai ki aapka vyaktigat data abhi bhi aavashaykta ke siddhanton ko dhyan me rakhen bina
block_18: dvaara sansaadhit kiya ja raha hai, to kripya gopniyata niti me nirdhaarit charanon ka paalan karke hamen bataen.
block_19: Hum apne sabhi adhikar aur upay surakshit rakhte hain.
block_20: Kissi bhi spashtikaran aur/ya kissi anya jaanakaari ke liye, jiske aapko aavashyakta ho sakte hai, humse sampark karne me sankoch na karen
